title: Cincinnati Financial Corporation Announces Internet Availability of Proxy Materials and Webcast for 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
text: CINCINNATI , March 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cincinnati Financial Corporation (NASDAQ:CINF) today announced the internet availability of materials for its 2022 Annual Meeting of Shareholders – the 2021 Annual Report on Form 10-K, the 2022 Annual Shareholder Meeting Notice and Proxy Statement and the 2022 Annual Letter to Shareholders. The company has filed these materials with the Securities and Exchange Commission, and they are available for viewing online.
